subcodes.title: Words to Badi Bushru'i and other students, Ramleh, 1913-09-19
subcodes.first_line: ...translate at least one page every day, either from English into Persian, or from Persian into English, thus they might acquire efficiency in this line of work. He recommended for the future that when the means are provided, a committee of translators be organized from both nationalities, who would know the two languages well, in addition to Arabic. Then the Tablets would be properly translated.
subcodes.subjects: @language and the structure of reality, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings
